text: Hello? Hello? Are you there? Are you? Hi, this is Chelsea. We pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note showing your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Do you have both part A and part B? I don't give information out on the phone. I don't know who you are or what your value is at the law. Yeah, I completely understand.
